description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with redis:latest and postgres:latest services and a cache of vendor/ruby. Define a before_script that runs ruby -v, installs bundler, rails, heroku, pg, rubocop, rspec, rake gems and runs bundle install for all jobs. Add a rspec job (default stage) that sets DATABASE_URL to the postgres service, runs rake db:migrate RAILS_ENV=test and bundle exec rspec spec, and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. Add a rubocop job (default stage) that runs rubocop. Add a rails job (default stage) that sets DATABASE_URL, runs rails db:migrate, rails db:seed and rails test. Add a production deploy job that runs gem install dpl and dpl --provider=heroku --app=mralfred with the provided API key, and a staging deploy job that does the same for the mralfred-staging app; both are type deploy. Finally add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on rspec, moves coverage/ to public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact expiring in 30 days.
